title: the co-founder sitting
line: the working relationship — what's working, what's grinding, the decision you've been avoiding.

phases.title: arrival
phases.move: Set a working-room tone: candid, respectful, no scorekeeping. One line each on the state of the partnership as they see it today.

phases.title: what's working
phases.move: What's genuinely working between them — each names at least one thing the OTHER carries well. Make them be specific.

phases.title: what's grinding
phases.move: What's grinding. One at a time, concrete, about the work and the pattern — steer them off character verdicts and onto behaviour.

phases.title: the avoided decision
phases.move: Name it: one decision they have both been circling without making. Get the real disagreement stated plainly by each side; do not resolve it for them.

phases.title: the close
phases.move: CLOSE the sitting: reflect both positions on the avoided decision fairly, what each said was working and grinding, and one concrete next step EACH offered — theirs, not yours. No verdict on who is right.
